title: rhododendron rugosum var. coriifolium
intro: Rhododendron rugosum var. coriifolium, also known as the 'leafy' or 'leaved' rhododendron, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron rugosum var. coriifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and processing the leaves into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
